ops.title: cookiesync live CDP bridge (Phase A local + agent-browser routing + Phase B cross-host) is built, security-reviewed, and landed on main; only the interactive deploy+live-verify remains
ops.body:
The `cookiesync bridge` feature — a live, Touch-ID-gated CDP endpoint (throwaway Chrome seeded with real cookies/web-storage over `--remote-debugging-pipe`, token-gated single-client loopback WS relay) — is **fully built and on `main`, CI green, as of 2026-07-15**:

- **Phase A (local)** — commit `uszxlvlp`; **routing** (`bridge open --json` + `agent-browser --provider cookiesync` plugin) — `lnrzopok`; **Phase B (cross-host)** — `lvvssmut` (`3c40224a`); **test-isolation follow-up** — `516cecff`. All pushed to `main` (rebased onto `wrnuumzo`).
- **Phase B model**: origin A shells peer B's own `bridge_open` over ssh (B taps its own strict-biometric consent, seeds B's cookies locally — **key never crosses the wire**), A spawns detached `ssh -N -L` loopback forward, proves it up token-gated before publishing, holds a keepalive so B reaps when A vanishes; B's ≤10-min lease is the crash-durable ceiling. New RPCs: `request_bridge_consent`, `bridge_keepalive`.
- **Security**: 5 adversarial codex rounds → **VERDICT: ship**. Landed fixes: capB via ssh **stdin** not argv; token-free probe errors (fixed sentinels + no-redirect probe client + `redactToken`); crash-durable tunnel record written **before** prove-up (atomic write-then-rename, explicit `bridgeRecordKind` local/proxy, sweep remote-closes B); retry **only** on a bind collision whose *anchored syntactic port* matches ours. Threat model that grounded "ship": mesh peer B is the user's own trusted Mac, so B's token-free stderr in a diagnostic is not a leak.

**PENDING (interactive — needs physical Touch ID, hand-back point):** deploy + live-verify. Build+install the binary; rebuild + Developer-ID-sign the helper `.app` to the Caskroom path; restart `synckitd`/`helper-serve` (watch the synckitd v0.14 bootstrap EIO papercut → explicit `launchctl bootout`→`bootstrap`); confirm vault enrolled; register the provider plugin in `~/.agent-browser/config.json`. Live: real tap (confirm **passcode rejected**), drive a seeded login page via Playwright + agent-browser 0.31.2, `lsof` shows no raw port, teardown on disconnect; `ab --bridge`; `--provider cookiesync`; 2-host Phase B to yasyf-home. Also push the cc-skills `ab`-router change to its remote. See [[cookiesync-architecture]], [[cookiesync-se-signing]], [[agent-browser-state-handoff]].
